title: nicotiana longiflora var. pauciflora
intro: Nicotiana longiflora var. pauciflora, also known as the Dwarf Jasmine Flower or Long Flower Tobacco, is a flowering plant species of the genus Nicotiana. It is a low-growing, herbaceous perennial with showy, fragrant flowers that are highly prized for their medicinal and herbal properties. The medicinal properties of Nicotiana longiflora var. pauciflora include its antispasmodic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to help with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, and it can be consumed as a tea or used in herbal preparations such as infusions, salves, and tinctures.
